description: OpenTelemetry instrumentation, Scalene/Memray profiling suite, and performance benchmarks for the Hansard corpus.
oracle_notes: Repo-side Track 19 implementation added telemetry dependency declarations, safe OpenTelemetry setup, console and JSONL file trace exporters, pipeline span instrumentation, profiling runners, docs, benchmark workflow, evidence helpers, and focused tests. Remaining external/runtime gates: install refreshed dev dependencies, run 1GB/full-corpus Scalene/Memray profiles, and run full-suite plus unskipped benchmark pass.
